name: io.github.hairglasses-studio.process-mcp
description: Process inspection and debugging with composed investigation workflows

tools.name: ps_list
tools.description: List processes sorted by CPU/mem/pid, filter by command substring

tools.name: ps_tree
tools.description: Show process tree for a PID (pstree, falls back to ps --forest)

tools.name: kill_process
tools.description: Send signal to process (TERM, KILL, HUP, INT, USR1, USR2, STOP, CONT)

tools.name: port_list
tools.description: List listening TCP ports with process info via ss

tools.name: gpu_status
tools.description: NVIDIA GPU status: temp, utilization, memory, power, running processes

tools.name: system_info
tools.description: Hostname, kernel, uptime, load average, CPU count, memory, swap

tools.name: investigate_port
tools.description: Port, process, tree, systemd unit, logs -- single tool replaces 4+ calls

tools.name: investigate_service
tools.description: Systemd status, process info, ports, logs -- single tool replaces 3-4 calls
